key_finding: Refit recovers Y1-Y4 R^2 0.90-0.96; published main-effect equations diverge from data
Bilayer coupled reproduction; matches published ANOVA (X1 sig, X2 not sig on TAM 30-min)
PS/PDI/EE R^2 within 5%; optimum prediction within 0.5% of published
Full quadratic R^2=0.98; X1+X3 significant, X2 (amp) matches published not-significant finding
PS/Q2h/Q24h R^2 0.92-0.96; EE/PDI weaker - documented (model spec differs from authors' DE-vii selection)
